FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.46sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f845ac73e20>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144499148 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144528011 {

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144670471 if (!missing(encoding))

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144713444 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144727245 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144727936 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144819881 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144834763 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144835554 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144851963 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144855678 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144935191 "default"))

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144961564 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144962395 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145001963 }

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145016034 }

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145129097 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145229555 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145243936 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144466020 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144468483 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144499148 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144499900 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144528011 {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144528732 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144541811 new <- list()
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144542572 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144575241 new$width <- width
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144575962 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144590363 new$height <- height
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144591154 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144609171 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/07/17 18:26:08.144624804 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144640036 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144640797 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144654828 new$version <- version
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144655759 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144669730 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144670471 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144684151 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144684842 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144699033 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144699824 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144712783 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144713444 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144727245 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144727936 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144743739 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144744470 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144770178 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144770939 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144786251 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144787023 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144803477 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144804258 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144819190 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144819881 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144834763 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144835554 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144851963 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144855678 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144882047 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144882988 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144913223 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144935191 "default"))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144946522 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144947343 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144961564 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144962395 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144973698 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144983977 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.144984808 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145001262 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145001963 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145015063 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145016034 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145031763 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145033305 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145051622 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145052364 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145068668 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145069469 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145127644 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145129097 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145140674 old$family <- family
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145141976 }
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145157779 version <- old$version

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145170728 "2.0")

2026/07/17 18:26:08.145186461 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145203696 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145204498 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145218989 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145219550 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145229555 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145230085 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145243936 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145244396 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145256564 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145257055 invisible()
2026/07/17 18:26:08.145274010 }
